calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Hearing Re: Order Specifying The Manner In Which Notice Must Be Given
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tracy Neal, Esq. 866-788-9998 of Beaumont Gitlin Tashjian for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner'S Hearing Re: Order Specifying The Manner In Which Notice Must Be Given is Granted.

Order after hearing on Petition to amend declaration of covenants, conditions and restrictions is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
